description: Create a GitHub Actions CD workflow that triggers on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux-win, build-linux-release, and macosx-bintray. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, configure, build, and package the TexStudio project. The build-linux-win job should build for Windows, build-linux-release for Linux, and macosx-bintray for macOS. Deploy the resulting artifacts to GitHub releases and upload to Bintray.
